task_description: The 'auth-service' service experienced a spike in ConnectionPoolExhausted errors at 05:29 UTC. A recent deployment changed the connection pool configuration, reducing capacity and causing cascading failures.

commits.author: alice@company.com
commits.message: feat: introduce cache layer rate limiting
commits.diff:
--- a/auth-service-service/cache_layer.go
+++ b/auth-service-service/cache_layer.go
-// Old: stable configuration
-config.MaxSize = 100
-config.Timeout = 30 * time.Second
+// New: reduced limits for 'optimization'
+config.MaxSize = 5
+config.Timeout = 5 * time.Second
+// WARNING: This may cause issues under high load
